//: Opt-in JS type checking for OpenEnsemble. We don't ship TypeScript
source files — code stays .mjs — but tsc runs in --noEmit/--allowJs/
--checkJs mode over files that include `// @ts-check` at the top.
Add a file to the type-check set by adding the comment; that's it.
- `checkJs: false` is the GLOBAL default — most files are ignored.
- `// @ts-check` in a file's first comment overrides the global
default for that file, enabling per-file checking. So the matrix is:
include glob ✗                → never seen by tsc
- `noEmit: true` makes tsc a pure linter; no .js output anywhere.
Add `// @ts-check` to your file to opt in. Run `npm run typecheck`
